tasks.label: commit-message-dp-fix
args: fix(auth): support login query params and move admin route to /dp

tasks.label: verify-live-dp
args: $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/login?next=/dp' -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($r1){'LOGIN_STATUS=' + [int]$r1.StatusCode}else{'LOGIN_STATUS=unknown'}; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/dp' -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($r2){'DP_STATUS=' + [int]$r2.StatusCode}else{'DP_STATUS=unknown'}; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/admin' -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; 'ADMIN_STATUS=200' } catch { if($_.Exception.Response){'ADMIN_STATUS=' + [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__} else {'ADMIN_STATUS=unknown'} }

tasks.label: verify-live-headers
args: for %u in ("https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/login?next=/dp" "https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/dp" "https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/admin") do @echo URL=%u & curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "HTTP_STATUS=%{http_code}\n" %u

tasks.label: commit-onboarding
args: feat(web): add customer login entry and guided onboarding flow

tasks.label: verify-live-onboarding-login
args: for %u in ("https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/" "https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/login" "https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/onboarding" "https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/login?next=/dp" "https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/dp") do @echo URL=%u & curl -s -o NUL -w "HTTP_STATUS=%{http_code}\n" %u

tasks.label: commit-auth-copy-message
args: feat(product): require login for scoring tool and enforce 3 free cloud scans

tasks.label: verify-live-auth-copy
args: curl -s https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/ | findstr /c:"Start free (3 scans)" && echo HOME_COPY_OK || echo HOME_COPY_NOT_LIVE & curl -s -o NUL -w "TOOL_STATUS=%{http_code}\n" https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/tool

tasks.label: verify-live-final
args: curl -s https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/ | find "Start free (3 scans)" >NUL && echo HOME_COPY_OK || echo HOME_COPY_NOT_LIVE & curl -s -o NUL -w "TOOL_STATUS=%{http_code}\n" https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/tool & curl -s -o NUL -w "EVALUATE_UNAUTH=%{http_code}\n" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"run\":{}}" https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/api/evaluate

tasks.label: inspect-fly-machines
args: flyctl status -a gravio-platform & flyctl machine list -a gravio-platform

tasks.label: verify-release-state
args: git status --short --branch; git log --oneline -n 5; git rev-parse HEAD; git remote -v

tasks.label: verify-release-state-no-pager
args: git -c core.pager=cat status --short --branch; git -c core.pager=cat log --oneline -n 5; git rev-parse HEAD; git remote -v

tasks.label: commit-and-push-ux-fixes
args: git add src/web/dashboard.html src/web/onboarding.html src/web/onboarding.js src/web/styles.css CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m "fix(ux): unify onboarding header and fix dashboard section layout" && git push origin master

tasks.label: commit-ux-fixes
args: git add src/web/dashboard.html src/web/onboarding.html src/web/onboarding.js src/web/styles.css CHANGELOG.md; git commit -m 'fix(ux): unify onboarding header and fix dashboard section layout'

tasks.label: commit-ux-fixes-safe
args: git add src/web/dashboard.html src/web/onboarding.html src/web/onboarding.js src/web/styles.css CHANGELOG.md; git commit -m fix-ux-header-dashboard-layout

tasks.label: verify-live-copy-post-deploy
args: $on = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/onboarding; if($on.Content -match 'ob-signup-cta'){ 'ONBOARDING_HAS_NEW_ID=YES' } else { 'ONBOARDING_HAS_NEW_ID=NO' }; if($on.Content -match 'id="ob-dashboard-cta"'){ 'ONBOARDING_HAS_DASHBOARD_CTA_ID=YES' } else { 'ONBOARDING_HAS_DASHBOARD_CTA_ID=NO' }; $db = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/dashboard; if($db.Content -match 'id="db-projects-section"'){ 'DASHBOARD_PROJECTS_SECTION=YES' } else { 'DASHBOARD_PROJECTS_SECTION=NO' }; if($db.Content -match 'id="db-apikeys-section"'){ 'DASHBOARD_APIKEYS_SECTION=YES' } else { 'DASHBOARD_APIKEYS_SECTION=NO' };

tasks.label: verify-post-release-state
args: git -c core.pager=cat status --short --branch; flyctl releases -a gravio-platform | Select-Object -First 8

tasks.label: audit-git-head
args: git -c core.pager=cat status --short --branch; git -c core.pager=cat log --oneline -n 3; git rev-parse HEAD

tasks.label: curl-check-domains
args: curl -I https://gravio.dev & curl -I https://www.gravio.dev & curl -I https://gravio-platform.fly.dev

tasks.label: fly-certs-status
args: flyctl certs list -a gravio-platform & flyctl status -a gravio-platform

tasks.label: fly-cert-details
args: flyctl certs show gravio.dev -a gravio-platform & flyctl certs show www.gravio.dev -a gravio-platform

tasks.label: add-fly-certs
args: flyctl certs add gravio.dev -a gravio-platform & flyctl certs add www.gravio.dev -a gravio-platform

tasks.label: check-fly-certs-and-https
args: flyctl certs check gravio.dev -a gravio-platform & flyctl certs check www.gravio.dev -a gravio-platform & curl -I https://gravio.dev & curl -I https://www.gravio.dev

tasks.label: verify-gravio-get-ps
args: $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing https://gravio.dev; if($r.StatusCode -eq 200){'GRAVIO_DEV_GET=200'}; if($r.Content -match 'Start free'){ 'HAS_START_FREE=YES' } else { 'HAS_START_FREE=NO' }

tasks.label: verify-gravio-status-code
args: curl -s -o NUL -w "GRAVIO_DEV_GET=%{http_code}\n" https://gravio.dev/ & curl -s -o NUL -w "FLY_DEV_GET=%{http_code}\n" https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/

tasks.label: commit-push-register-first-flow
args: git add CHANGELOG.md src/server.mjs src/web/dashboard.html src/web/index.html src/web/onboarding.html src/web/onboarding.js src/web/styles.css tests/server.test.mjs; git commit -m 'feat(onboarding): register-first guided flow and canonical host sessions'; git push origin master

tasks.label: commit-push-register-first-safe
args: git add CHANGELOG.md src/server.mjs src/web/dashboard.html src/web/index.html src/web/onboarding.html src/web/onboarding.js src/web/styles.css tests/server.test.mjs; git commit -m register-first-onboarding-flow; git push origin master

tasks.label: verify-live-flow-markers
args: curl -s https://gravio.dev/ | findstr /C:"Start free" /C:"Onboarding" /C:"Start free (3 scans)" /C:"#install">nul & echo HOME_FETCH_OK & curl -s https://gravio.dev/ | findstr /C:"href=\"/onboarding\" class=\"m-btn m-btn-neon m-btn-sm\">Start free" & curl -s https://gravio.dev/onboarding | findstr /C:"id=\"ob-start-free\"" /C:"id=\"ob-project-id\"" /C:"cmd-publish" /C:"run in 30 seconds" /C:"npm ci" & curl -s -o NUL -w "GRAVIO_DEV_STATUS=%{http_code}\n" https://gravio.dev/

tasks.label: verify-home-startfree
args: $h = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing https://gravio.dev/; if($h.Content -match 'Start free'){ 'HOME_HAS_START_FREE=YES' } else { 'HOME_HAS_START_FREE=NO' }; if($h.Content -match 'Start free \(3 scans\)'){ 'HOME_HAS_OLD_TEXT=YES' } else { 'HOME_HAS_OLD_TEXT=NO' }; if($h.Content -match 'href="/onboarding" class="m-btn m-btn-neon m-btn-sm">Start free'){ 'HOME_STARTFREE_POINTS_ONBOARDING=YES' } else { 'HOME_STARTFREE_POINTS_ONBOARDING=NO' }

tasks.label: verify-onboarding-markers
args: $o = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing https://gravio.dev/onboarding; if($o.Content -match 'id="ob-start-free"'){ 'ONBOARDING_HAS_START_BUTTON=YES' } else { 'ONBOARDING_HAS_START_BUTTON=NO' }; if($o.Content -match 'id="ob-project-id"'){ 'ONBOARDING_HAS_PROJECT_INPUT=YES' } else { 'ONBOARDING_HAS_PROJECT_INPUT=NO' }; if($o.Content -match 'run in 30 seconds'){ 'ONBOARDING_HAS_OLD_COPY=YES' } else { 'ONBOARDING_HAS_OLD_COPY=NO' }; if($o.Content -match 'npm ci'){ 'ONBOARDING_HAS_NPM_CI=YES' } else { 'ONBOARDING_HAS_NPM_CI=NO' }

tasks.label: verify-domain-status
args: curl -s -o NUL -w "GRAVIO_DEV_STATUS=%{http_code}\n" https://gravio.dev/ & curl -s -o NUL -w "ONBOARDING_STATUS=%{http_code}\n" https://gravio.dev/onboarding

tasks.label: check-onboarding-new-markers
args: curl -s https://gravio.dev/onboarding | findstr /C:"ob-start-free" /C:"ob-project-id" /C:"Create your project name"

tasks.label: verify-canonical-redirect-live
args: curl -s -o NUL -w "FLY_ROOT_STATUS=%{http_code} REDIRECT=%{redirect_url}\n" https://gravio-platform.fly.dev/ & curl -s -o NUL -w "WWW_ROOT_STATUS=%{http_code} REDIRECT=%{redirect_url}\n" https://www.gravio.dev/

tasks.label: commit-push-copy-cleanup
args: git add src/web/index.html; git commit -m remove-install-wording; git push origin master

tasks.label: final-status-and-release
args: git -c core.pager=cat status --short --branch; git rev-parse --short HEAD; flyctl releases -a gravio-platform | Select-Object -First 6
